common.noMatchingData: No defect data matching the current criteria.

navTooltip.repeatability:
Process: FT#1, ATE, IMAGE, SET Inspection
Condition: Same Location consecutive NG 2+
Grade: A (Line Stop)
Table: RAW + IP_PRODUCT_WORK_QC
Period: Today 08:00 ~ Next day 08:00
* Final judgment based on repair history (IP_PRODUCT_WORK_QC)
navTooltip.repeatabilityStatus: Grade A (Red): Consecutive same location → Line Stop required
navTooltip.nonConsecutive:
Process: FT#1, ATE, IMAGE, SET Inspection
Condition: Same Location 2+ (non-consecutive)
Grade: B (Ship Hold), excludes A
Table: RAW + IP_PRODUCT_WORK_QC
Period: Today 08:00 ~ Next day 08:00
* Final judgment based on repair history (IP_PRODUCT_WORK_QC)
navTooltip.nonConsecutiveStatus: Grade B (Orange): Same location non-consecutive 2+ → Ship Hold
navTooltip.accident:
Process: HIPOT, BURN-IN, ATE
HIPOT: NG 1+ → Grade A (Line Stop)
BURNIN/ATE: 2+ → Grade A, 1 → Grade B
Table: RAW tables per process
Period: Today 08:00 ~ Next day 08:00
navTooltip.accidentStatus:
Grade A (Red): HIPOT 1+ or others 2+ → Line Stop
Grade B (Orange): BURNIN/ATE 1 → Ship Hold
navTooltip.material:
Target: Same DEFECT_ITEM_CODE (component)
Excludes: Common parts (2703M01, 2005A01, etc.) → managed in Open/Short
Grade A: Same part daily 3+ NG
Grade C: Same part 90-day cumulative 3+
Table: IP_PRODUCT_WORK_QC
Period: A=daily, C=90-day cumulative
navTooltip.materialStatus:
Grade A (Red): Same part daily 3+ → Line Stop
Grade C (Purple): 90-day cumulative 3+ → Quality improvement
navTooltip.openShort:
Process: ICT (W090, W430)
Target: OPEN(B2020) / SHORT(B2030)
Parts: Common parts (2703M01, 2005A01, 2007A01, 2007M01, 2011A01, 2203A01)
Grade: Same defect code daily 2+ → Grade B
Table: IP_PRODUCT_WORK_QC
Period: Today 08:00 ~
navTooltip.openShortStatus: Grade B (Orange): Same defect code daily 2+ → Ship Hold
navTooltip.indicator:
Target: 5 processes (ICT, Hi-Pot, FT, Burn-In, ATE)
Content: PPM comparison by model/process (prev vs current)
Criteria: 200%+ vs previous period → Red
Filter: Models <200 inspections excluded, new models excluded
Cycle: Weekly (Mon-Sun) / Monthly (1st-last) selectable
navTooltip.indicatorStatus:
Red: 200%+ vs previous period
Green: Under 200%
Gray: No defects (0)
navTooltip.fpy:
Target: All processes (ICT, Hi-Pot, FT, Burn-In, ATE, IMAGE, SET)
Content: Daily first pass yield by line/process
Criteria: FPY below 90% → Grade A (Line Stop)
Period: Today 10:00 ~ (shows 0 before 10:00)
navTooltip.fpyStatus:
Red: FPY below 90% (Grade A - Line Stop)
Yellow: FPY 90~95%
Green: FPY 95% or above
navTooltip.u1fpy:
Target: U1 dedicated processes (HIPOT, ATE, Firmware, ICT, BURNIN)
Content: Daily first pass yield by line/process
Criteria: FPY below 90% → Grade A (Line Stop)
Period: Today 10:00 ~ (shows 0 before 10:00)
navTooltip.u1fpyStatus:
Red: FPY below 90% (Grade A - Line Stop)
Yellow: FPY 90~95%
Green: FPY 95% or above
navTooltip.equipment:
Target: Equipment stop time per line/process
Table: IP_LINE_DAILY_OPERATION_HIST
Criteria: Daily stop time 60min+ → Grade C
Period: Today (F_GET_WORK_ACTUAL_DATE)
navTooltip.equipmentStatus:
Red: 60min+ stop (Grade C - Improve)
Yellow: Stop occurred (under 60min)
Gray: No stop
navTooltip.equipmentHistory:
Table: IP_LINE_DAILY_OPERATION_HIST
Content: Daily equipment operation/stop history records
Period: Today (F_GET_WORK_ACTUAL_DATE)
navTooltip.equipmentHistoryStatus:
Red: Stop time 60min+
Yellow: Stop occurred (<60min)
Green: Normal operation
navTooltip.repairStatus:
Table: IP_PRODUCT_WORK_QC
Content: Daily defect PID repair status
Period: Today 08:00 ~ Next day 08:00
navTooltip.qualityDashboard:
Table: IP_PRODUCT_WORK_QC
Content: Process/defect code/line/model/hourly charts
Period: Today 08:00 ~ Next day 08:00
navTooltip.qualityDashboardStatus:
Chart colors: Color palette applied per preset
Layout: 2-col / 3-col / 2-col + full bottom
Presets: Default / Admin / Line / Quality / All
navTooltip.analysis: Content: Comprehensive analysis of all 8 monitors

slackSettings.title: Notification Settings (Slack / Teams)
slackSettings.webhookUrlDesc: Copy the URL from Slack App → Incoming Webhooks → Add New Webhook
slackSettings.channelNameDesc: Display channel name. The actual delivery channel is determined by webhook settings.
slackSettings.teamsWebhookUrlDesc: Supports both Teams Incoming Webhook URL and Power Automate HTTP trigger URL.
slackSettings.notificationConditionsDesc: Choose which events should trigger a Slack notification
slackSettings.passRateDropDesc: When the pass rate is below the threshold (90%)
slackSettings.ngSpikeDesc: When the number of NGs increases sharply
slackSettings.lineStopDesc: When a production line stop occurs
slackSettings.equipmentDownDesc: When equipment stops for a long time (60 min+)
slackSettings.dailyReportDesc: Send production summary at a specified time daily
slackSettings.mentionOnUrgentDesc: Notify the whole channel for urgent situations like line stops or pass rate drops
slackSettings.dailyReportTimeDesc: Production summary report will be sent at this time daily (inactive if empty)
slackSettings.monitorDesc: Automatically sends Teams notifications when Grade A anomalies are detected. Alerts are sent only at the moment of OK→A transition to prevent duplicates.
slackSettings.envDisabledWarning: ⚠️ This server has CTQ_MONITOR_ENABLED=false — monitoring is disabled.
slackSettings.runNowSuccess: Run now complete. Please check logs.
slackSettings.restartToApply: Takes effect after saving settings and restarting
slackSettings.enterSlackUrl: Please enter Slack webhook URL first.
slackSettings.slackTestSuccess: Slack test message sent. Please check Slack!
slackSettings.slackTestFailed: Failed to send Slack test message.
slackSettings.slackTestError: An error occurred during Slack test.
slackSettings.enterTeamsUrl: Please enter Teams webhook URL first.
slackSettings.teamsTestSuccess: Teams test message sent. Please check Teams!
slackSettings.teamsTestFailed: Failed to send Teams test message.
slackSettings.teamsTestError: An error occurred during Teams test.
slackSettings.slackAlertDesc: Turn Slack notifications on or off
